About Me

I am an early-career computer scientist specializing in data science, automation, and cloud-based data engineering. I am currently working in an independent position to deliver a scalable, HIPAA-compliant ETL pipeline. This solution integrates multi-sourced and multi-formatted EMR data into a standardized database schema using a script-driven command pattern enabled via polymorphic deserialization under the Azure Functions Isolated Worker Model.

My skills in ETL, data analytics, and workflow automation were first developed through brute-force methods made necessary by the realities of laboratory operations. Today, these self-taught foundations are backed by formal computer science education, professional experience, and an ever-growing full-stack approach.

In addition to automating database transactions from a LIMS and correcting years' worth of historical test data I also design analytical dashboards and build pipelines that extract actionable insight from this data. Whether reporting trended quality data or using data mining to identify trends in a sample cluster. My diverse background working in labs across a variety of industries fosters an intuitive understanding of lab data flows, allowing me to bridge the gap between scientific compliance and modern software engineering.

Experience

Nierman Practice Management Present
Data Integration Engineer Mar 2026 – Present
  • Architecting and developing Azure-based ETL pipelines for the DentalWriterPlus project, utilizing an Isolated Worker model and polymorphic JSON schema mapping to migrate EMR data into Azure SQL databases.
  • Implementing state management patterns and domain-driven design to ensure data integrity during complex ingestion cycles within medical and dental billing environments.
  • Maintaining rigorous security standards and HIPAA compliance for cloud-based data systems and automated workflows.
  • Managing technical version control and project structure via Git to support collaborative software development.
Kelly Scientific Recruiting (Contractor) 1 yr 5 mos
Eurofins Testing | Sterility Technician 1 Apr 2025 – Sep 2025
  • Managed healthcare-related data for clinical specimens in a CLIA-regulated setting.
  • Performed structured data entry and validation to maintain compliance with patient-data standards.
  • Experience with HIPAA regulations.
Newmont Mining | Analytical Chemistry Technician 1 Jun 2024 – Apr 2025
  • Developed Python scripts to automate data entry for a variety of laboratory instrumentation, reducing 1-2 hour manual data entry time for mass spec results to a 15 minute update cycle.
  • Navigated an undocumented legacy database to map relationships where I identified a self-self dependency issue. Developed a parameter-table system to workaround the issue and generate Power BI-based longitudinal and batch-level quality metrics that previously required months of manual effort.
  • Collaborated with chemists to correct and update LIMS workflows, ensuring accuracy of updates through pre-deployment testing.
Tolmar Pharmaceuticals 1 yr 4 mos
QA Associate 1 Feb 2023 – Sep 2023
  • Maintained precise, GMP-compliant records supporting manufacturing batch release and regulatory inspections.
Quality Control Laboratory Tech 1 Jun 2022 – Feb 2023
  • Performed laboratory support and data entry workflows.
Flagship Biosciences 10 mos
Scanning Lab Technician Jun 2022 – Mar 2023
  • Audited digital pathology metadata for accuracy and completeness in Phase I–III clinical trial datasets.
  • Identified and documented data discrepancies to ensure the integrity of research-bound datasets.
